name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: Lord Arryn’s death was a great sadness for all of us, my lord,” Grand Maester Pycelle said. “I would be more than happy to tell you what I can of the manner of his passing. Do be seated. Would you care for refreshments? Some dates, perhaps? I have some very fine persimmons as well. Wine no longer agrees with my digestion, I fear, but I can offer you a cup of iced milk, sweetened with honey. I find it most refreshing in this heat.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle以食物饮品和老年消化寒暄，表示愿说明Jon Arryn死亡。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Pycelle用refreshments和身体闲谈控制会面节奏；调查者必须先进入他设定的老人礼仪时间。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: There was no denying the heat; Ned could feel the silk tunic clinging to his chest. Thick, moist air covered the city like a damp woolen blanket, and the riverside had grown unruly as the poor fled their hot, airless warrens to jostle for sleeping places near the water, where the only breath of wind was to be found. “That would be most kind,” Ned said, seating himself.
blocks.explanation_zh: 闷热使silk贴身，穷人为争河边通风处拥挤；Eddard接受iced milk。
blocks.literary_note_zh: damp blanket比喻把热写成覆盖全城的重量，穷人比Red Keep居民更缺通风空间。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Pycelle lifted a tiny silver bell with thumb and forefinger and tinkled it gently. A slender young serving girl hurried into the solar. “Iced milk for the King’s Hand and myself, if you would be so kind, child. Well sweetened.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle摇银铃叫年轻serving girl准备加蜜冰奶。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard向Pycelle复盘Jon Arryn病程；老人以资历、寒暄和自然死亡框架解释急性腹痛、治疗更换与临终话。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: As the girl went to fetch their drinks, the Grand Maester knotted his fingers together and rested his hands on his stomach. “The smallfolk say that the last year of summer is always the hottest. It is not so, yet ofttimes it feels that way, does it not? On days like this, I envy you northerners your summer snows.” The heavy jeweled chain around the old man’s neck chinked softly as he shifted in his seat. “To be sure, King Maekar’s summer was hotter than this one, and near as long. There were fools, even in the Citadel, who took that to mean that the Great Summer had come at last, the summer that never ends, but in the seventh year it broke suddenly, and we had a short autumn and a terrible long winter. Still, the heat was fierce while it lasted. Oldtown steamed and sweltered by day and came alive only by night. We would walk in the gardens by the river and argue about the gods. I remember the smells of those nights, my lord—perfume and sweat, melons ripe to bursting, peaches and pomegranates, nightshade and moonbloom. I was a young man then, still forging my chain. The heat did not exhaust me as it does now.” Pycelle’s eyes were so heavily lidded he looked half-asleep. “My pardons, Lord Eddard. You did not come to hear foolish meanderings of a summer forgotten before your father was born. Forgive an old man his wanderings, if you would. Minds are like swords, I do fear. The old ones go to rust. Ah, and here is our milk.” The serving girl placed the tray between them, and Pycelle gave her a smile. “Sweet child.” He lifted a cup, tasted, nodded. “Thank you. You may go.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 他从末夏酷暑讲到Maekar时期长夏、Oldtown青春与衰老，最后自称mind如旧剑生锈。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 长meandering可能是真衰老、社交习惯或拖延；文本只让Eddard观察half-asleep，不能直接定性表演。
blocks.background_zh: **季节史：** Pycelle回忆Maekar时代长夏在第七年突然结束，随后短autumn和长winter；是他个人历史记忆。

blocks.original_text: When the girl had taken her leave, Pycelle peered at Ned through pale, rheumy eyes. “Now where were we? Oh, yes. You asked about Lord Arryn . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: serving girl离开后，他才重新聚焦Jon Arryn。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard向Pycelle复盘Jon Arryn病程；老人以资历、寒暄和自然死亡框架解释急性腹痛、治疗更换与临终话。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “I did.” Ned sipped politely at the iced milk. It was pleasantly cold, but oversweet to his taste.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard礼貌喝下过甜冰奶。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard向Pycelle复盘Jon Arryn病程；老人以资历、寒暄和自然死亡框架解释急性腹痛、治疗更换与临终话。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “If truth be told, the Hand had not seemed quite himself for some time,” Pycelle said. “We had sat together on council many a year, he and I, and the signs were there to read, but I put them down to the great burdens he had borne so faithfully for so long. Those broad shoulders were weighed down by all the cares of the realm, and more besides. His son was ever sickly, and his lady wife so anxious that she would scarcely let the boy out of her sight. It was enough to weary even a strong man, and the Lord Jon was not young. Small wonder if he seemed melancholy and tired. Or so I thought at the time. Yet now I am less certain.” He gave a ponderous shake of his head.
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle说Jon长期忧郁疲倦，原以为是政务、年老、病弱儿子与焦虑妻子所累，如今却不确定。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Pycelle先给忧郁建立多重合理解释，再说now less certain，制造可继续追问的模糊。
blocks.background_zh: **Jon family：** Jon年老、son Robert体弱、Lysa高度焦虑，这些都是Pycelle解释长期疲惫的背景。

blocks.original_text: “What can you tell me of his final illness?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard要求描述final illness。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard向Pycelle复盘Jon Arryn病程；老人以资历、寒暄和自然死亡框架解释急性腹痛、治疗更换与临终话。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: The Grand Maester spread his hands in a gesture of helpless sorrow. “He came to me one day asking after a certain book, as hale and healthy as ever, though it did seem to me that something was troubling him deeply. The next morning he was twisted over in pain, too sick to rise from bed. Maester Colemon thought it was a chill on the stomach. The weather had been hot, and the Hand often iced his wine, which can upset the digestion. When Lord Jon continued to weaken, I went to him myself, but the gods did not grant me the power to save him.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle说Jon前一天健康但因某事烦恼并借书，次晨剧痛卧床；Colemon诊为胃寒，随后持续衰弱死亡。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 时间线关键：借lineages book时尚hale，次晨急性腹痛，随后迅速weakening。
blocks.background_zh: **医疗时间线：** Jon借book翌日急性腹痛；Colemon先治，Pycelle后来接手，最终死亡。

blocks.original_text: “I have heard that you sent Maester Colemon away.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard指出Pycelle曾把Maester Colemon赶走。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard向Pycelle复盘Jon Arryn病程；老人以资历、寒暄和自然死亡框架解释急性腹痛、治疗更换与临终话。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: The Grand Maester’s nod was as slow and deliberate as a glacier. “I did, and I fear the Lady Lysa will never forgive me that. Maybe I was wrong, but at the time I thought it best. Maester Colemon is like a son to me, and I yield to none in my esteem for his abilities, but he is young, and the young ofttimes do not comprehend the frailty of an older body. He was purging Lord Arryn with wasting potions and pepper juice, and I feared he might kill him.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle承认，称Colemon年轻、不懂老年身体脆弱，其purging和pepper juice可能杀死Jon。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 送走Colemon可被解释为保护病人，也客观上使Pycelle独占最后治疗；意图尚未证明。
blocks.background_zh: **旧式治疗：** purging、wasting potions和pepper juice意在排出病因，也可能使虚弱患者脱水或恶化；Pycelle以此解释换医。

blocks.original_text: “Did Lord Arryn say anything to you during his final hours?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard问Jon临终是否说过什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard向Pycelle复盘Jon Arryn病程；老人以资历、寒暄和自然死亡框架解释急性腹痛、治疗更换与临终话。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Pycelle wrinkled his brow. “In the last stage of his fever, the Hand called out the name Robert several times, but whether he was asking for his son or for the king I could not say. Lady Lysa would not permit the boy to enter the sickroom, for fear that he too might be taken ill. The king did come, and he sat beside the bed for hours, talking and joking of times long past in hopes of raising Lord Jon’s spirits. His love was fierce to see.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle说Jon高烧中反复叫Robert，可能指儿子或king；Robert曾在床边陪伴。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert一词有son／king双指可能，Pycelle强调无法判断，保留临终呼唤对象歧义。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Was there nothing else? No final words?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard追问final words。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard向Pycelle复盘Jon Arryn病程；老人以资历、寒暄和自然死亡框架解释急性腹痛、治疗更换与临终话。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “When I saw that all hope had fled, I gave the Hand the milk of the poppy, so he should not suffer. Just before he closed his eyes for the last time, he whispered something to the king and his lady wife, a blessing for his son. The seed is strong, he said. At the end, his speech was too slurred to comprehend. Death did not come until the next morning, but Lord Jon was at peace after that. He never spoke again.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle说给milk of poppy后，Jon向king与Lysa说the seed is strong，随后失语、次晨死亡。
blocks.literary_note_zh: the seed is strong被Pycelle解释为son blessing，但slurred speech与上下文也使真正含义仍待调查。
blocks.background_zh: **药物：** milk of poppy是强效止痛镇静剂，可使语言含糊和意识下降；Pycelle在认为无望后使用。

blocks.original_text: Ned took another swallow of milk, trying not to gag on the sweetness of it. “Did it seem to you that there was anything unnatural about Lord Arryn’s death?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard忍住甜腻反胃，问死亡是否有unnatural之处。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 过甜milk从口味不适转成gag反应，与poison询问相邻，形成细微感官不安但不是被下毒证据。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Unnatural?” The aged maester’s voice was thin as a whisper. “No, I could not say so. Sad, for a certainty. Yet in its own way, death is the most natural thing of all, Lord Eddard. Jon Arryn rests easy now, his burdens lifted at last.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle说死亡本身最natural，Jon如今卸下负担安息。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Pycelle把unnatural death问题哲学化为death最natural，避开了病因是否人为。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “This illness that took him,” said Ned. “Had you ever seen its like before, in other men?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard问是否见过类似illness。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard向Pycelle复盘Jon Arryn病程；老人以资历、寒暄和自然死亡框架解释急性腹痛、治疗更换与临终话。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Near forty years I have been Grand Maester of the Seven Kingdoms,” Pycelle replied. “Under our good King Robert, and Aerys Targaryen before him, and his father Jaehaerys the Second before him, and even for a few short months under Jaehaerys’s father, Aegon the Fortunate, the Fifth of His Name. I have seen more of illness than I care to remember, my lord. I will tell you this: Every case is different, and every case is alike. Lord Jon’s death was no stranger than any other.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle列举自己服侍四位king近四十年，结论是每次疾病既不同又相似，Jon之死不稀奇。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 资历清单建立权威，‘every case different/alike’却是难以证伪的概括，没有回答具体相似病例。
blocks.background_zh: **任期：** Pycelle自Aegon V末期起历事Jaehaerys II、Aerys II和Robert，近四十年任Grand Maester。

blocks.original_text: “His wife thought otherwise.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard说Lysa不如此认为。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard提出Lysa怀疑和poison可能，取得lineages book与Cersei不在城的证词，却反而更关心Pycelle究竟服务谁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: The Grand Maester nodded. “I recall now, the widow is sister to your own noble wife. If an old man may be forgiven his blunt speech, let me say that grief can derange even the strongest and most disciplined of minds, and the Lady Lysa was never that. Since her last stillbirth, she has seen enemies in every shadow, and the death of her lord husband left her shattered and lost.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle以stillbirth后多疑和grief derange mind贬低Lysa判断。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 以Lysa心理不稳定解释指控可能合理，也会使最早提出poison的人失去可信度；需要独立证据。
blocks.background_zh: **Lysa经历：** Pycelle说她在最近stillbirth后越发多疑；这是他对其心理的评价，不等于她的poison指控必假。

blocks.original_text: “So you are quite certain that Jon Arryn died of a sudden illness?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard确认他坚持sudden illness结论。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard提出Lysa怀疑和poison可能，取得lineages book与Cersei不在城的证词，却反而更关心Pycelle究竟服务谁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “I am,” Pycelle replied gravely. “If not illness, my good lord, what else could it be?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle反问若非病还能是什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard提出Lysa怀疑和poison可能，取得lineages book与Cersei不在城的证词，却反而更关心Pycelle究竟服务谁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Poison,” Ned suggested quietly.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard轻声提出poison。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 单词Poison令会面从医案复盘变成潜在murder inquiry。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Pycelle’s sleepy eyes flicked open. The aged maester shifted uncomfortably in his seat. “A disturbing thought. We are not the Free Cities, where such things are common. Grand Maester Aethelmure wrote that all men carry murder in their hearts, yet even so, the poisoner is beneath contempt.” He fell silent for a moment, his eyes lost in thought.
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle瞬间睁眼不安，谴责poisoner低于蔑视并停顿思考。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Pycelle眼睛flicked open和shifted是可见不安，不足以单独证明知情或罪责。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “What you suggest is possible, my lord, yet I do not think it likely. Every hedge maester knows the common poisons, and Lord Arryn displayed none of the signs. And the Hand was loved by all. What sort of monster in man’s flesh would dare to murder such a noble lord?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 他承认可能却认为不大可能，称常见毒征象均无且Jon受人爱戴。
blocks.literary_note_zh: ‘受所有人爱戴’回答的是motive想象，不是毒理可能；absence of common signs也不能排除所有poison。
blocks.background_zh: **毒理限制：** Pycelle仅说common poisons无典型signs；未知或少见毒物是否可能没有得到排除。

blocks.original_text: “I have heard it said that poison is a woman’s weapon.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard引用poison是woman’s weapon的说法。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard提出Lysa怀疑和poison可能，取得lineages book与Cersei不在城的证词，却反而更关心Pycelle究竟服务谁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Pycelle stroked his beard thoughtfully. “It is said. Women, cravens . . . and eunuchs.” He cleared his throat and spat a thick glob of phelm onto the rushes. Above them, a raven cawed loudly in the rookery. “The Lord Varys was born a slave in Lys, did you know? Put not your trust in spiders, my lord.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle补充women、cravens、eunuchs，并主动警告不要信Varys。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Pycelle从一般性别偏见滑向具体Varys警告，主动为Eddard指定嫌疑方向。
blocks.background_zh: **事实／偏见：** poison为women、cravens、eunuchs武器是文化成见；Pycelle借此暗示Varys，不是证据。

blocks.original_text: That was scarcely anything Ned needed to be told; there was something about Varys that made his flesh crawl. “I will remember that, Maester. And I thank you for your help. I have taken enough of your time.” He stood.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard本就厌恶Varys，礼貌感谢并准备离开。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard提出Lysa怀疑和poison可能，取得lineages book与Cersei不在城的证词，却反而更关心Pycelle究竟服务谁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Grand Maester Pycelle pushed himself up from his chair slowly and escorted Ned to the door. “I hope I have helped in some small way to put your mind at ease. If there is any other service I might perform, you need only ask.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle慢慢送门，称希望令他安心并愿继续服务。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard提出Lysa怀疑和poison可能，取得lineages book与Cersei不在城的证词，却反而更关心Pycelle究竟服务谁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “One thing,” Ned told him. “I should be curious to examine the book that you lent Jon the day before he fell ill.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard要求查看Jon发病前借的book。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard临走才问book，避免过早暴露自己对lineage主题兴趣。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “I fear you would find it of little interest,” Pycelle said. “It was a ponderous tome by Grand Maester Malleon on the lineages of the great houses.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle称那只是Malleon所著great houses lineages的枯燥巨册。
blocks.literary_note_zh: ponderous既评价书重／枯燥，也可能降低Eddard继续追查的欲望。
blocks.background_zh: **书目：** Grand Maester Malleon的tome记录great houses lineages；Jon发病前主动索取，调查意义尚不明确。

blocks.original_text: “Still, I should like to see it.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard仍坚持要看。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard提出Lysa怀疑和poison可能，取得lineages book与Cersei不在城的证词，却反而更关心Pycelle究竟服务谁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: The old man opened the door. “As you wish. I have it here somewhere. When I find it, I shall have it sent to your chambers straightaway.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle答应找到后立即送到chambers。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard提出Lysa怀疑和poison可能，取得lineages book与Cersei不在城的证词，却反而更关心Pycelle究竟服务谁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “You have been most courteous,” Ned told him. Then, almost as an afterthought, he said, “One last question, if you would be so kind. You mentioned that the king was at Lord Arryn’s bedside when he died. I wonder, was the queen with him?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard假装随口追加一问：Jon床边有king，queen是否也在。
blocks.literary_note_zh: almost as afterthought是Eddard的询问策略，问题实际在测试Cersei是否有机会接近病人。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Why, no,” Pycelle said. “She and the children were making the journey to Casterly Rock, in company with her father. Lord Tywin had brought a retinue to the city for the tourney on Prince Joffrey’s name day, no doubt hoping to see his son Jaime win the champion’s crown. In that he was sadly disappointed. It fell to me to send the queen word of Lord Arryn’s sudden death. Never have I sent off a bird with a heavier heart.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle说Cersei与children随Tywin去Casterly Rock参加Joffrey name-day tourney后返程，因此不在城。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei不在城是Pycelle证词与可查行程，不自动排除她通过他人行动。
blocks.background_zh: **不在场：** Pycelle说Jon临终时Cersei和children随Tywin前往Casterly Rock；可降低亲自在场可能，不排除远程参与。

blocks.original_text: “Dark wings, dark words,” Ned murmured. It was a proverb Old Nan had taught him as a boy.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard想起Old Nan教的proverb：dark wings, dark words。
blocks.literary_note_zh: proverb把raven通信与悲讯绑定，承接全书多次消息改变家庭命运。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “So the fishwives say,” Grand Maester Pycelle agreed, “but we know it is not always so. When Maester Luwin’s bird brought the word about your Bran, the message lifted every true heart in the castle, did it not?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle反驳ravens不总带坏消息，以Bran苏醒来信为例。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Pycelle用Bran来信反例显得温和准确，也提醒proverb不是事实规则。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “As you say, Maester.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard表面同意。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard提出Lysa怀疑和poison可能，取得lineages book与Cersei不在城的证词，却反而更关心Pycelle究竟服务谁。

blocks.original_text: “The gods are merciful.” Pycelle bowed his head. “Come to me as often as you like, Lord Eddard. I am here to serve.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle称gods merciful，再次说自己服务Eddard。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard提出Lysa怀疑和poison可能，取得lineages book与Cersei不在城的证词，却反而更关心Pycelle究竟服务谁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Yes, Ned thought as the door swung shut, but whom?
blocks.explanation_zh: 门关时Eddard心问：究竟服务谁。
blocks.literary_note_zh: whom是整场会谈总结：Pycelle反复宣称serve，Eddard真正调查的是服务关系而非礼貌。

blocks.original_text: On the way back to his chambers, he came upon his daughter Arya on the winding steps of the Tower of the Hand, windmilling her arms as she struggled to balance on one leg. The rough stone had scuffed her bare feet. Ned stopped and looked at her. “Arya, what are you doing?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 回房路上他看见Arya在Tower台阶单脚平衡，赤足已被粗石磨伤。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya训练插入谋杀调查，让Eddard的Hand职责与父亲职责再次在同一楼梯相遇。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Syrio says a water dancer can stand on one toe for hours.” Her hands flailed at the air to steady herself.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya说Syrio称water dancer可单趾站数小时。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 楼梯上Arya训练引出Bran未来；Eddard能为儿子想象多种道路，却仍把女儿限制在婚姻和sons的间接成就中。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Ned had to smile. “Which toe?” he teased.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard笑问是哪根toe。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 玩笑暂时打断警惕状态，显示他与Arya能用轻松方式谈危险训练。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Any toe,” Arya said, exasperated with the question. She hopped from her right leg to her left, swaying dangerously before she regained her balance.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya嫌问题多余，换腿危险摇晃后重新平衡。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 楼梯上Arya训练引出Bran未来；Eddard能为儿子想象多种道路，却仍把女儿限制在婚姻和sons的间接成就中。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Must you do your standing here?” he asked. “It’s a long hard fall down these steps.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard提醒台阶很高，摔下后果严重。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 楼梯上Arya训练引出Bran未来；Eddard能为儿子想象多种道路，却仍把女儿限制在婚姻和sons的间接成就中。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Syrio says a water dancer never falls.” She lowered her leg to stand on two feet. “Father, will Bran come and live with us now?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya说water dancer never falls，随后问Bran是否会来同住。
blocks.literary_note_zh: never falls与Bran事故形成读者可见反讽；Arya下一句立刻把fall联想到弟弟未来。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Not for a long time, sweet one,” he told her. “He needs to win his strength back.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard说很久不会，他需恢复strength。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 楼梯上Arya训练引出Bran未来；Eddard能为儿子想象多种道路，却仍把女儿限制在婚姻和sons的间接成就中。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Arya bit her lip. “What will Bran do when he’s of age?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya问Bran成年后能做什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 楼梯上Arya训练引出Bran未来；Eddard能为儿子想象多种道路，却仍把女儿限制在婚姻和sons的间接成就中。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Ned knelt beside her. “He has years to find that answer, Arya. For now, it is enough to know that he will live.” The night the bird had come from Winterfell, Eddard Stark had taken the girls to the castle godswood, an acre of elm and alder and black cottonwood overlooking the river. The heart tree there was a great oak, its ancient limbs overgrown with smokeberry vines; they knelt before it to offer their thanksgiving, as if it had been a weirwood. Sansa drifted to sleep as the moon rose, Arya several hours later, curling up in the grass under Ned’s cloak. All through the dark hours he kept his vigil alone. When dawn broke over the city, the dark red blooms of dragon’s breath surrounded the girls where they lay. “I dreamed of Bran,” Sansa had whispered to him. “I saw him smiling.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard跪下说他有多年寻找答案，当前只需庆幸存活；回忆全家曾在castle godswood守夜感谢。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard不承诺恢复，只把live设为当前足够的事实；godswood vigil显示感恩与哀伤共存。
blocks.background_zh: **godswood：** Red Keep godswood没有weirwood heart tree，Eddard一家把古oak当作心树祈祷。

blocks.original_text: “He was going to be a knight,” Arya was saying now. “A knight of the Kingsguard. Can he still be a knight?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya说Bran原想成为Kingsguard knight，问是否仍能。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 楼梯上Arya训练引出Bran未来；Eddard能为儿子想象多种道路，却仍把女儿限制在婚姻和sons的间接成就中。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “No,” Ned said. He saw no use in lying to her. “Yet someday he may be the lord of a great holdfast and sit on the king’s council. He might raise castles like Brandon the Builder, or sail a ship across the Sunset Sea, or enter your mother’s Faith and become the High Septon.” But he will never run beside his wolf again, he thought with a sadness too deep for words, or lie with a woman, or hold his own son in his arms.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard诚实说不能，却列举lord、councillor、builder、sailor、High Septon等道路，心中哀悼更多身体损失。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他诚实排除knight，又打开多种成人角色；内心清单却显示他仍以失去旧可能来哀悼。
blocks.background_zh: **Bran未来：** 失去腿部功能排除传统mounted knight道路，但不排除landholding、council、scholarship、religion或航海等。

blocks.original_text: Arya cocked her head to one side. “Can I be a king’s councillor and build castles and become the High Septon?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya问自己能否当councillor、建castle或做High Septon。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya把给Bran的可能直接应用自己，敏锐暴露Eddard列举的机会其实被gender分配。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “You,” Ned said, kissing her lightly on the brow, “will marry a king and rule his castle, and your sons will be knights and princes and lords and, yes, perhaps even a High Septon.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard仍按传统性别脚本回答她会嫁king、统治丈夫城堡并由sons取得这些身份。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard让她间接rule、让sons直接成就；这是爱女父亲仍受传统性别想象限制的证据。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Arya screwed up her face. “No,” she said, “that’s Sansa.” She folded up her right leg and resumed her balancing. Ned sighed and left her there.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya说那是Sansa的路，重新单脚站立；Eddard叹气离开。
blocks.literary_note_zh: ‘that’s Sansa’不是单纯拒绝marriage，而是Arya确认姐妹代表两套不同未来。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Inside his chambers, he stripped off his sweat-stained silks and sluiced cold water over his head from the basin beside the bed. Alyn entered as he was drying his face. “My lord,” he said, “Lord Baelish is without and begs audience.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard回房冲凉换衣，Alyn报告Littlefinger求见。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger带来四名遗留household witnesses，尤其是被Robert册封的Jon squire Ser Hugh。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Escort him to my solar,” Ned said, reaching for a fresh tunic, the lightest linen he could find. “I’ll see him at once.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard让立即带到solar。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger带来四名遗留household witnesses，尤其是被Robert册封的Jon squire Ser Hugh。

blocks.original_text: Littlefinger was perched on the window seat when Ned entered, watching the knights of the Kingsguard practice at swords in the yard below. “If only old Selmy’s mind were as nimble as his blade,” he said wistfully, “our council meetings would be a good deal livelier.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger坐窗边看Kingsguard练剑，讽刺Barristan剑比mind灵活。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger把Barristan的honor和严肃解释为council无趣，评价尺度与Eddard相反。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Ser Barristan is as valiant and honorable as any man in King’s Landing.” Ned had come to have a deep respect for the aged, white-haired Lord Commander of the Kingsguard.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard维护Barristan勇敢honorable。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger带来四名遗留household witnesses，尤其是被Robert册封的Jon squire Ser Hugh。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “And as tiresome,” Littlefinger added, “though I daresay he should do well in the tourney. Last year he unhorsed the Hound, and it was only four years ago that he was champion.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger说也很tiresome，却仍可能赢tourney。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger带来四名遗留household witnesses，尤其是被Robert册封的Jon squire Ser Hugh。

blocks.original_text: The question of who might win the tourney interested Eddard Stark not in the least. “Is there a reason for this visit, Lord Petyr, or are you here simply to enjoy the view from my window?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard对tourney毫无兴趣，直问来意。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger带来四名遗留household witnesses，尤其是被Robert册封的Jon squire Ser Hugh。

blocks.original_text: Littlefinger smiled. “I promised Cat I would help you in your inquiries, and so I have.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger说为履行对Catelyn承诺，已帮助调查。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger带来四名遗留household witnesses，尤其是被Robert册封的Jon squire Ser Hugh。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: That took Ned aback. Promise or no promise, he could not find it in him to trust Lord Petyr Baelish, who struck him as too clever by half. “You have something for me?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard惊讶，仍认为Petyr聪明过头而不可信。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger带来四名遗留household witnesses，尤其是被Robert册封的Jon squire Ser Hugh。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Someone,” Littlefinger corrected. “Four someones, if truth be told. Had you thought to question the Hand’s servants?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger纠正不是thing而是four someones，问是否查Jon servants。
blocks.literary_note_zh: someone纠正把调查从抽象线索转回可询问的人证网络。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Ned frowned. “Would that I could. Lady Arryn took her household back to the Eyrie.” Lysa had done him no favor in that regard. All those who had stood closest to her husband had gone with her when she fled: Jon’s maester, his steward, the captain of his guard, his knights and retainers.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard说Lysa把maester、steward、guard captain等household全带回Eyrie。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Lysa撤走household可能是逃离危险或控制信息；本章只确认其结果使调查困难。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Most of her household,” Littlefinger said, “not all. A few remain. A pregnant kitchen girl hastily wed to one of Lord Renly’s grooms, a stablehand who joined the City Watch, a potboy discharged from service for theft, and Lord Arryn’s squire.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger列出留下的pregnant kitchen girl、City Watch stablehand、被逐potboy及Jon squire。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger带来四名遗留household witnesses，尤其是被Robert册封的Jon squire Ser Hugh。
blocks.background_zh: **四名证人：** 留城者为kitchen girl、stablehand、potboy与squire；Littlefinger掌握位置，尚未提供证词内容。

blocks.original_text: “His squire?” Ned was pleasantly surprised. A man’s squire often knew a great deal of his comings and goings.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard因squire通常知主人行踪而欣喜。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger带来四名遗留household witnesses，尤其是被Robert册封的Jon squire Ser Hugh。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Ser Hugh of the Vale,” Littlefinger named him. “The king knighted the boy after Lord Arryn’s death.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger说是Ser Hugh of the Vale，Jon死后由Robert册封。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Ser Hugh在Jon死后立即knighted可能是正常奖赏，也可能值得追问；目前不能视为贿赂。
blocks.background_zh: **Ser Hugh：** 原为Jon Arryn squire，Jon死后由Robert knighted；原因与时间值得询问但尚无罪证。

blocks.original_text: “I shall send for him,” Ned said. “And the others.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard准备召见他和其他人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger带来四名遗留household witnesses，尤其是被Robert册封的Jon squire Ser Hugh。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Littlefinger winced. “My lord, step over here to the window, if you would be so kind.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger皱眉，叫他到window边。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 窗边现场展示Varys和Cersei各自watchers；Eddard决定让可信servant秘密调查，并在感谢Littlefinger时被提醒继续怀疑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Why?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard问为什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 窗边现场展示Varys和Cersei各自watchers；Eddard决定让可信servant秘密调查，并在感谢Littlefinger时被提醒继续怀疑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Come, and I’ll show you, my lord.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger说会展示。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 窗边现场展示Varys和Cersei各自watchers；Eddard决定让可信servant秘密调查，并在感谢Littlefinger时被提醒继续怀疑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Frowning, Ned crossed to the window. Petyr Baelish made a casual gesture. “There, across the yard, at the door of the armory, do you see the boy squatting by the steps honing a sword with an oilstone?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 他指armory门边磨剑boy。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger不只说有人监视，而让Eddard自己看见具体位置和动作，提高警告可信度。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “What of him?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard问此人有什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 窗边现场展示Varys和Cersei各自watchers；Eddard决定让可信servant秘密调查，并在感谢Littlefinger时被提醒继续怀疑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “He reports to Varys. The Spider has taken a great interest in you and all your doings.” He shifted in the window seat. “Now glance at the wall. Farther west, above the stables. The guardsman leaning on the ramparts?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger说boy向Varys报告，再指向stable上方rampart guard。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys spy的工作伪装为普通磨剑劳动，情报网络嵌在日常castle service中。
blocks.background_zh: **监视：** Littlefinger指认armory boy为Varys informer；此为他的情报，Eddard只亲眼看见boy位置和磨剑行为。

blocks.original_text: Ned saw the man. “Another of the eunuch’s whisperers?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard猜也是Varys whisperer。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 窗边现场展示Varys和Cersei各自watchers；Eddard决定让可信servant秘密调查，并在感谢Littlefinger时被提醒继续怀疑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “No, this one belongs to the queen. Notice that he enjoys a fine view of the door to this tower, the better to note who calls on you. There are others, many unknown even to me. The Red Keep is full of eyes. Why do you think I hid Cat in a brothel?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger说此人属于queen，负责记录谁进Tower；Red Keep eyes遍布，故把Catelyn藏brothel。
blocks.literary_note_zh: queen watcher与Varys watcher并存，说明Red Keep没有单一全知网络，而是多个权力中心互相观察。
blocks.background_zh: **多方网络：** stable上方guard据称替Cersei观察Tower访客；Red Keep存在相互竞争的监视系统。

blocks.original_text: Eddard Stark had no taste for these intrigues. “Seven hells,” he swore. It did seem as though the man on the walls was watching him. Suddenly uncomfortable, Ned moved away from the window. “Is everyone someone’s informer in this cursed city?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard厌恶intrigues，感到那人确在观察，退窗并问是否人人都是informer。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 窗边现场展示Varys和Cersei各自watchers；Eddard决定让可信servant秘密调查，并在感谢Littlefinger时被提醒继续怀疑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Scarcely,” said Littlefinger. He counted on the fingers on his hand. “Why, there’s me, you, the king . . . although, come to think on it, the king tells the queen much too much, and I’m less than certain about you.” He stood up. “Is there a man in your service that you trust utterly and completely?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger用自己、Eddard、king开玩笑，又问他是否绝对信任某个servant。
blocks.literary_note_zh: king tells queen too much把Robert也纳入信息泄露链；无需正式informer，亲密谈话就能传递秘密。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Yes,” said Ned.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard回答有。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 窗边现场展示Varys和Cersei各自watchers；Eddard决定让可信servant秘密调查，并在感谢Littlefinger时被提醒继续怀疑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “In that case, I have a delightful palace in Valyria that I would dearly love to sell you,” Littlefinger said with a mocking smile. “The wiser answer was no, my lord, but be that as it may. Send this paragon of yours to Ser Hugh and the others. Your own comings and goings will be noted, but even Varys the Spider cannot watch every man in your service every hour of the day.” He started for the door.
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger以出售Valyria palace讽刺他天真，建议让可信servant秘密访谈四名证人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Valyria palace是不可能真实交付的诈骗比喻；Littlefinger说绝对信任本身就是可被出售的天真。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: “Lord Petyr,” Ned called after him. “I . . . am grateful for your help. Perhaps I was wrong to distrust you.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard感谢帮助并说也许不该怀疑他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard因实际帮助略微放松怀疑，显示合作容易被误读为可靠人格。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。

blocks.original_text: Littlefinger fingered his small pointed beard. “You are slow to learn, Lord Eddard. Distrusting me was the wisest thing you’ve done since you climbed down off your horse.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger说Eddard学得慢，怀疑自己正是他到城后最明智之举。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger主动恢复不信任，既显得坦率也让自己控制关系规则：他希望Eddard依赖帮助却不把他当friend。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon Arryn医案、证词可靠性、Eddard询问策略、Bran未来或Red Keep监视网络。
